description: Visual frameworks for lean methodology, fundraising, investor communication, and MVP planning — helping founders turn uncertainty into structured visual thinking that accelerates decision-making and stakeholder alignment

templates.name: Lean Canvas
templates.description: Single-canvas business model mapping with 9 blocks covering Problem, Solution, Key Metrics, UVP, Unfair Advantage, Channels, Segments, Costs, and Revenue plus a hypothesis validation tracker

templates.name: Pitch Deck Planning
templates.description: Slide-by-slide pitch deck storyboard with narrative arc guide, visual direction notes, talking points, and rehearsal preparation for fundraising presentations

templates.name: Investor Relations Board
templates.description: Fundraising process management board with investor pipeline kanban, term sheet comparison, cap table impact analysis, and milestone planning

templates.name: MVP Planning
templates.description: Minimum viable product scoping board with feature prioritization matrix, build timeline, success criteria, and validation experiment design
